description: Composition Red round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and has graphic and flock print with 'Happiness guaranteed' printed on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash warm inside out with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Tickle your funny bone and make the world laugh with you with the lettering 'Happiness guaranteed' on this T-shirt from mr. men. Made of pure cotton fabric, this tee wicks away sweat and keeps you comfortable and dry. Pair it with jeans or chinos and comfortable casual shoes or sandals. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
